finding_results.notes: Replaced the post-collision inventory beat with Maren's embodied sense of the crowded skull, Derry's live reaction, and a Vess/Aldric exchange that turns the unsettled state into immediate bank-and-settlement pressure before Aldric fails at the reclassification description.

summary: Revised the collision aftermath to stay in Maren's body and ear, show the new three-way configuration through live scene pressure, and preserve the unclassified reclassification beat without pausing for schematic summary.
